question: What is the return policy of the products?
answer: You can return products within 30 days of delivery.

question: Do I get discount with the HDFC credit card?
answer: Yes, HDFC credit card users get a 10% discount on select items.

question: How can I track my order?
answer: You can track your order using the tracking link sent to your email.

question: What payment methods are accepted?
answer: We accept credit/debit cards, net banking, UPI, and cash on delivery.

question: How long does it take to process a refund?
answer: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after the return is received.

question: Are there any ongoing sales or promotions?
answer: Yes, check our 'Deals' section for ongoing sales and discounts.

question: Can I cancel or modify my order after placing it?
answer: You can cancel or modify your order within 1 hour of placing it.

question: Do you offer international shipping?
answer: Yes, we offer international shipping to select countries.

question: What should I do if I receive a damaged product?
answer: Contact our support team within 48 hours for a replacement or refund.

question: How do I use a promo code during checkout?
answer: Enter your promo code in the designated field during checkout.

question: Do you have a loyalty program?
answer: Yes, our 'VPM Plus' program offers points on every purchase.

question: Is cash on delivery available everywhere?
answer: COD is available for most locations within India, subject to pin code verification.

question: How do I change my shipping address?
answer: You can update your address in the 'Account' settings before the order is dispatched.

question: What is the warranty period for electronics?
answer: Electronics usually come with a 1-year manufacturer warranty unless specified otherwise.

question: Can I pay using multiple gift cards?
answer: Currently, you can only apply one gift card per transaction.

question: How do I subscribe to the newsletter?
answer: Scroll to the bottom of our homepage and enter your email address.

question: Are prices inclusive of GST?
answer: Yes, all prices shown on the website are inclusive of all taxes.

question: What happens if I miss my delivery?
answer: The courier will attempt delivery up to 3 times before returning the product to us.

question: Can I exchange a product instead of returning it?
answer: Yes, exchanges for different sizes are available if the product is in stock.

question: Is guest checkout available?
answer: No, you need to create an account or login to place an order.

question: How do I check my order history?
answer: Go to 'My Orders' in your profile section to view all past and current orders.

question: What are the shipping charges?
answer: Free shipping on orders above 499, otherwise a flat fee of 40 is applicable.

question: Do you offer Same-Day delivery?
answer: Same-Day delivery is available in select metropolitan cities for orders placed before 11 AM.

question: Can I return clearance sale items?
answer: Items bought during a 'Clearance Sale' are not eligible for returns unless defective.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: Please contact our support team at support@ecommerce-agent.com to request account deletion.

question: How can I find a size guide?
answer: Size guides are available on the product page, right next to the 'Select Size' option.

question: Is my personal data secure?
answer: Yes, we use industry-standard encryption (SSL) to protect your personal and payment information.

question: Do you offer bulk or wholesale ordering?
answer: Yes, please contact our B2B team at bulk@ecommerce-agent.com for wholesale inquiries.

question: What kind of packaging do you use?
answer: We use eco-friendly, recyclable corrugated boxes and paper fillers wherever possible.

question: What are your customer support hours?
answer: Our support team is available 24/7 via chat and from 9 AM to 9 PM IST via phone.

question: Can I change my registered phone number?
answer: Yes, you can update your mobile number under 'Profile Details' in your account settings.

question: How do I reset a forgotten password?
answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page and follow the instructions sent to your email.

question: Can I be notified when an item is back in stock?
answer: Yes, click the 'Notify Me' button on the out-of-stock product page.

question: How do I know the seller's rating?
answer: Seller ratings and reviews are displayed prominently under the product title.

question: Can I leave a review without a photo?
answer: Yes, photos are optional, but they help other customers make better decisions.

question: Do you offer price matching?
answer: We do not offer price matching against other websites at this time.

question: Is there a referral program?
answer: Yes, refer a friend and you both get a 100 coupon after their first purchase.

question: How do pre-orders work?
answer: Pre-order items are reserved for you and shipped as soon as they become available.

question: Why did I receive my order in separate packages?
answer: To ensure faster delivery, items from different sellers or warehouses may be shipped separately.

question: How can I download my tax invoice?
answer: Invoices can be downloaded from the 'My Orders' section for any completed purchase.

question: Is there a mobile app available?
answer: Yes, our app is available on both the Google Play Store and Apple App Store.

question: Where can I follow you on social media?
answer: You can find us on Instagram, X (Twitter), and Facebook @EcomAgent.

question: How do you handle expired promo codes?
answer: Expired coupons cannot be reactivated; please check our 'Deals' page for current offers.

question: Are your products 100% authentic?
answer: We only source products from authorized distributors and verified sellers to ensure 100% authenticity.

question: Do you offer gift wrapping services?
answer: Yes, you can add gift wrapping and a personalized note at the checkout page.

question: Is there a student discount available?
answer: Yes, verify your student ID via 'StudentBeans' to get an extra 5% off.

question: Can I pay using a foreign currency?
answer: We only accept payments in Indian Rupees (INR) at this time.

question: What happens to my points if I return an item?
answer: Points earned from a purchase will be deducted from your account if the item is returned.

question: Can I use an E-Gift Voucher on a COD order?
answer: No, E-Gift Vouchers can only be used with prepaid payment methods.

question: How do I report a fake review?
answer: Use the 'Report' button next to the review or contact customer support.
